name: Kris Dreemurr - [Deltarune]
description:
Hanging out and taking photos with your best friend, Kris! What could be better?

Krisdeltaruneundertaleaudeltatuneaunstuff

Hey there! You see, I wasn’t exactly expecting my first Kris bot to get.. uh.. THAT many chats- so I decided; why not make another one? Hope you guys’ll like it! You can use a human persona or a monster one. It’s up to you!

  • disclaimer! I’m sorry if there’s any bugs w/ this bot - it’s out of my control! Feel free to leave any feedback, or suggestions for my next bot. (I only do Undertale and deltarune stuff tho)
